hero.subtitle: Your space, your pace
hero.desc: Forget the lines. Your favorite drink ready whenever you want. Book your ideal table to work or chat.

home.reserveDesc: Looking for the perfect place to focus? Book your co-work space and ensure your productivity with the best coffee in La Paz.
home.closedMsg: ⚠️ The store is currently closed. We are not taking orders at this time.
home.closedMsgCart: ⚠️ The store is closed today. We are not receiving orders at this time, please try again later.
home.outOfHours: ⚠️ Outside of order hours (8:30 - 15:00). Check delivery availability via WhatsApp.
home.outOfHoursCart: Note: You are ordering outside standard hours (8:30 - 15:00). We will coordinate your delivery or pickup via WhatsApp.
home.culture1Desc: Bolivia has unique altitudes that give our coffee chocolate and citrus notes impossible to replicate...
home.culture2Desc: More than a coffee shop, we are a meeting point for creatives, digital nomads, and dreamers in La Paz...

matchmaker.greeting: Hi! I'm your Indigo Coffee virtual barista. What kind of flavors do you like in your coffee?
